holdings.infoBox: EEMX is an equity ETF with a total of 1062 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 15.03%, Samsung Electronics at 8.54%, SK hynix at 6.64%, Tencent Holdings at 2.98%, and Alibaba Group Holding at 1.80%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR MSCI Emerging Markets Fossil Fuel Reserves Free ETF (EEMX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks a subset of the MSCI Emerging Markets Index that excludes companies that own fossil fuel reserves. EEMX was launched on Oct 24, 2016 and is issued by State Street.
infoTable: MSCI Emerging Markets ex Fossil Fuels
